rootCause: The item creation form attempted to upload images to a non-existent `/api/upload` endpoint. The failed fetch threw during submission, preventing the client from writing the item (including its image data) to IndexedDB and leaving the Create Item button seemingly inert.
resolution: Store uploaded images locally as data URLs and persist them directly in IndexedDB without calling `/api/upload`. Item persistence now routes through the custom content database layer with explicit entity-type handling to keep item metadata intact while saving and updating records.
